---
title: "Time Series Analysis (WISE)"
---

## Lecture Slides

1. [Introduction to Time Series](/files/teaching/time-series-analysis/unit1.html)
2. [Linear Time Series Models](/files/teaching/time-series-analysis/unit2.html)
3. [Estimation and Inference](/files/teaching/time-series-analysis/unit3.html)
4. [Nonstationary Time Series Models](/files/teaching/time-series-analysis/unit4.html)
5. [Regression with Time Series Data](/files/teaching/time-series-analysis/unit5.html)
6. [Cointegration and Error Correction Models](/files/teaching/time-series-analysis/unit6.html)
7. Vector Autoregressions
8. Structural VARs and Identification
